aesthetic_direction: Industrial Minimalist & Editorial Tech. High-contrast typography, textural depth, and asymmetrical bento grids. It must look hand-crafted by a top design studio, avoiding the generic 'purple/teal AI slop'. Deep neutral blacks with a sharp Rust/Amber accent for warmth and tension.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24 for section padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use 'Bento Box' asymmetry for Skills and Projects. Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, and row-span-2 to create tension. Avoid perfect symmetry.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align most content. Center-align only for deliberate pauses (e.g., CTA at the bottom).

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with a 1px subtle border (border-white/5). No heavy drop shadows. Hover states should slightly lighten the border (border-white/15) and apply a subtle -translate-y-1.
surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a bottom border-white/10. Sticky top.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E05D3A] text-white hover:bg-[#C74B2A] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/40 transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3

surfaces_and_components.badges: Border-collapse tech look. 1px solid border-white/10, font-mono text-xs text-neutral-400 px-3 py-1

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border lightening and icon translates (group-hover:translate-x-1).
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is MANDATORY. Use framer-motion for subtle viewport entry fades (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).
motion_and_interactions.texture: Include a fixed, pointer-events-none noise overlay (opacity 2-4%) across the entire site for an editorial feel.

page_structure_and_content.content: Logo (Monogram/Name), Nav Links (About, Skills, Projects, Blog), CTA (Let's Talk).

Massive typography. H1: 'Building Digital Precision.' or 'Frontend & Architecture.' Subtitle: 'Senior Software Engineer specializing in Angular, React, and scalable design systems.' Visual: Abstract texture background or subtle 3D generated element.
Concise summary. Focus on engineering depth, UI/UX bridge, and technical leadership.
Grid showcasing Angular, TypeScript, React, System Architecture, Performance. Use tech-badge aesthetics.
Timeline or sleek rows (border-b) detailing past roles. High contrast dates (font-mono).
2-3 massive case studies. Use generated images as cover art. Include tags for tech stack.
page_structure_and_content.layout: Staggered layout. Image on one side, text on the other. Alternate sides.

page_structure_and_content.content: 3 static teaser cards for engineering articles (e.g., 'Architecting Angular for Scale', 'Micro-frontends in 2026').
Massive 'Let's Build Together' text. Email link, GitHub, LinkedIn. Footer with refined finish.

hero_texture.description: Abstract dark grainy texture. Use as a subtle absolute background in the Hero section, masked with a gradient to blend into black.

project_1.description: 3D geometric architectural shape. Use for Project 1 cover.

project_2.description: Minimalist UI mockup floating. Use for Project 2 cover.

project_3.description: Data visualization art. Use for Project 3 cover.

blog_1.description: Dark minimalist workspace. Use for blog teaser thumbnail.

blog_2.description: Abstract architecture lines. Use for blog teaser thumbnail.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT build a standard tech template. Execute the 'Industrial Minimalist' look.
Add the font imports (Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) to the index.css or via Google Fonts/Fontshare.
Ensure all buttons, links, and forms include appropriate `data-testid` attributes.
Implement smooth scrolling using Lenis (or similar) to make the experience feel premium.
Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations on sections.
In the Hero section, use the 'hero_texture' image as an absolute background layer with a dark gradient mask (to fade out at the edges).
Implement a bento grid for the Skills section (e.g. mix 1x1, 2x1, 2x2 boxes) utilizing the borders and tech typography styling.
Strictly follow the color palette provided: deep off-black base, bright clean text, and the singular #E05D3A accent color. Avoid using purple or teal.
CRITICAL: Do not use placeholders for missing images. Only use the provided 'media_urls'.
